name: Neutreeko
author: Jan Kristian Haugland (2001) / AGP port
description: Neutreeko (Jan Kristian Haugland, 2001) on a 5x5 board — a portmanteau of Neutron and Teeko. Each player has three pieces; a piece slides orthogonally or diagonally until stopped by a piece or the board edge (it cannot stop short). Win by getting your three pieces in a connected row, orthogonally or diagonally. The same position occurring three times is a draw. Solved: perfect play from the official start is a draw. Official site: neutreeko.net.
